subject: Re: can WARP remove gold fiducials?
body:
Hey Jesse,

We have a nice little guide over at
https://teamtomo.org/walkthroughs/EMPIAR-10164/2d-preprocessing.html where
you can find some info about this. If you switch to the `Fiducials` tab in
the text, you'll see how to use GoldNet to mask out fiducials in
reconstructions.

Note that this works with 1.0.9, not 1.1, for which you'd have to retrain
the network.

Best,
Lorenzo

On Wed, Oct 25, 2023 at 10:29 AM mrJ <bluufive@gmail.com> wrote:

> hi all,
>
> Just wondering if there is any way to remove gold fiducials in WARP?
>
> Currently the gold is disrupting template matching in the tomograms.
>
> thanks!
>
> Jesse
>
